headline: Wall Street Analysts Look Bullish on Prologis (PLD): Should You Buy?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Prologis (PLD) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: Why I Put 75% Of My Retirement In Infrastructure Assets
summary: Most investors allocate most of their assets to equities and fixed income, but I think that infrastructure investments offer better risk-to-reward. Read what investors need to know.
